clean_output:
article_id: art-2026-03-04-022
summary: The article keeps the main methodological tension visible: the taxonomy is informative, but its full-corpus coding pipeline remains reliability-bounded.
review_confidence: high
contradictions:
  - contradiction_text: The study presents a large empirical map of developer-provided context, but that map depends on an LLM-assisted coding pipeline that aligned with human raters only moderately and still left some line-level disagreement unresolved.
    related_claim_texts:
      - The paper's thematic results are informative but methodologically bounded because full-dataset coding relied on repeated LLM labeling with only moderate agreement to human raters and some unresolved line-level disagreement.
    related_fact_refs:
      - fact-009
      - fact-010
      - fact-011
      - fact-012
      - fact-015
    related_evidence_ids:
      - evidence-10
      - evidence-11
      - evidence-12
      - evidence-15
    disposition: unresolved
    disclosure: Keep visible that the category frequencies are measured patterns within this coding pipeline, not exact ground truth, because human-human agreement was stronger than LLM-human agreement, some lines never converged under repeated labeling, and duplicated text may amplify reported thematic distributions.
